refs.description: Guava's CacheBuilder provides a size-bounded cache with LRU-style eviction backed by a segmented LinkedHashMap design.
HashiCorp's standalone Go LRU cache library, the canonical hash-map + doubly-linked-list implementation.
Redis uses approximate LRU eviction for the allkeys-lru / volatile-lru maxmemory policies.
Caffeine's BoundedLocalCache uses access-ordered eviction with ring-buffer batched reads to approximate LRU at high concurrency.
